description.ko: 유기적인 식물과 디지털 건축이 만나는 숨막히는 시각화로, 빛나는 광섬유 꽃잎과 맥동하는 데이터 스트림 뿌리를 가진 생물 발광 꽃이 특징입니다.
description.en: A breathtaking visualization where organic flora meets digital architecture, featuring bioluminescent flowers with glowing fiber-optic petals and pulsating data-stream roots.

prompt: Hyper-realistic macro photography of a digital orchid, petals made of semi-transparent holographic glass, glowing circuitry patterns inside the leaves, neon cyan and magenta bioluminescence, fiber-optic stamens, dark futuristic background, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, synthwave aesthetic.
